select.value: SELECT VUCH_NBR ,CST_ID ,CST_NM ,VUCH_TYPE_ID ,VUCH_TYPE_NM ,WITH_CARD_F ,BIZ_TYPE_ID ,BIZ_TYPE_NM ,ORG_ID ,ORG_NM ,BRANCH_ORG_ID ,BRANCH_ORG_NM ,OPEN_DT ,CLOSE_DT ,VUCH_STATUS_ID ,VUCH_STATUS_NM ,DEPT_ID ,MARKETING_NO FROM IBS.T1_VUCH_DETAIL WHERE {#condition#} WITH UR

SELECT re.VUCH_NBR ,re.EMP_ID ,re.EMP_NM ,re.EMP_ORG_ID ,re.EMP_ORG_NM ,re.CLAIM_STATUS_ID ,(case when coalesce(re.RVS_STATUS_ID,'') in ('2','21') then re.RVS_DT else re.CLAIM_DT end) as CLAIM_DT ,(case when coalesce(re.RVS_STATUS_ID,'') in ('2','21') then re.RVS_RATIO else re.RATIO end) as RATIO ,(case when coalesce(re.RVS_STATUS_ID,'') in ('2','21') then re.RVS_CLAIM_EMP_ID else re.VERIFY_EMP_ID end) as VERIFY_EMP_ID ,(case when coalesce(re.RVS_STATUS_ID,'') in ('2','21') then re.RVS_CLAIM_DT else re.VERIFY_DT end) as VERIFY_DT ,(case when coalesce(re.RVS_STATUS_ID,'') in ('2','21') then rstp.RVS_STATUS_NM else ctp.CLAIM_STATUS_NM end) as CLAIM_STATUS_NM FROM IBS.T1_VUCH_EMP_RELA re left join ibs.T9_CLAIM_STATUS_TYPE ctp on ctp.CLAIM_STATUS_ID=re.CLAIM_STATUS_ID left join ibs.T9_RVS_STATUS_TYPE rstp on rstp.RVS_STATUS_ID=re.RVS_STATUS_ID WHERE re.CLAIM_STATUS_ID IN ('1', '2', '5', '6') AND {#condition#} ORDER BY re.VUCH_NBR, re.EMP_ID

button.name: sub
button.label: 提交
button.confirmessage: 提交前请确认数据已经保存。提交后数据将不能修改，是否确认提交?

inputbox.jsvalidate: isNumeric(不是合法数字);isNotEmpty(不可以为空值);isPositiveInt(请输入正确的认领比例)

col.label: 推荐人（大堂经理）员工号

inputbox.servervalidate: isPersonnel(必须是员工号);isDTCanNotClaim(大堂经理不能认领此借据号)

select.value: SELECT A.VUCH_NBR , A.EMP_ID , A.EMP_NM , A.ORG_ID , A.ORG_NM , A.EMP_ORG_ID , A.EMP_ORG_NM ,(case when coalesce(A.RVS_STATUS_ID,'') in ('2','21') then A.RVS_RATIO else A.RATIO end) as RATIO , A.CLAIM_STATUS_ID ,(case when coalesce(A.RVS_STATUS_ID,'') in ('2','21') then A.RVS_DT else A.CLAIM_DT end) as CLAIM_DT ,(case when coalesce(A.RVS_STATUS_ID,'') in ('2','21') then A.RVS_CLAIM_DT else A.VERIFY_DT end) as VERIFY_DT ,(case when coalesce(A.RVS_STATUS_ID,'') in ('2','21') then A.RVS_CLAIM_EMP_ID else A.VERIFY_EMP_ID end) as VERIFY_EMP_ID ,(case when coalesce(A.RVS_STATUS_ID,'') in ('2','21') then rstp.RVS_STATUS_NM else ctp.CLAIM_STATUS_NM end) as CLAIM_STATUS_NM ,COALESCE(A.REMARK,'') AS REMARK ,COALESCE(A.REMARK1,'') AS REMARK1 ,C.EMP_ID AS DT_EMP_ID FROM IBS.T1_VUCH_EMP_RELA A left join ibs.T9_CLAIM_STATUS_TYPE ctp on ctp.CLAIM_STATUS_ID=A.CLAIM_STATUS_ID left join ibs.T9_RVS_STATUS_TYPE rstp on rstp.RVS_STATUS_ID=A.RVS_STATUS_ID LEFT JOIN IBS.T1_LN_LOBBY_MANAGER_RELA C ON A.EMP_ID=C.MANAGER_EMP_ID AND A.VUCH_NBR=C.BIZ_DIL_NBR WHERE {#condition#}

vpanel.footer:
提示：1-只能够填写本人认领信息，不可以代人认领。
2-“推荐人（大堂经理）员工号”非必输项，且仅可以认领“个人贷款”、“小企业贷款”。
